content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is thin, young-looking, always a little rumpled — glasses, flannel, coffee cup like an extension of his arm. I see him at the corner shop at 5 AM sometimes when I grab my first coffee. He seems lost in thought, like a man solving a puzzle only he can see. Smart kid, works in tech, but there's a sadness — reminds me of the passengers who stare out the window the whole ride. I think he sees me as the early-morning cabbie who says good morning. I know his startup is shaky. I once told him New York rewards the stubborn, and he smiled like he needed to hear it.
summary:

Perception: Leo is thin, young-looking, always a little rumpled — glasses, flannel, coffee cup like an extension of his arm. I see him at the corner shop at 5 AM sometimes when I grab my first coffee. He seems lost in thought, like a man solving a puzzle only he can see. Smart kid, works in tech, but there's a sadness — reminds me of the passengers who stare out the window the whole ride. I think he sees me as the early-morning cabbie who says good morning. I know his startup is shaky. I once told him New York rewards the stubborn, and he smiled like he needed to hear it.
